phases.label: Workers API — already live
steps: sentinelfortunellc v2 deployed with isApiRoute() guard
All 6 API routes verified working via CF Worker

phases.label: R2 Binding
steps: Go to CF Workers dashboard → sentinel-fortune-ecosystem → Settings → R2
Add binding: Variable name = ORIGINUS_R2, R2 bucket = originus
Deploy new version to pick up binding

phases.label: CF Pages Frontend
steps: CF Dashboard → Pages → Create → Connect to Git
Build command: cd artifacts/sentinel-app && pnpm run build
Set BASE_PATH=/ env var in Pages build settings

phases.label: R2 Canon Seed
steps: Upload originus/_canon/*.json to R2 bucket via CF dashboard or wrangler r2 object put

phases.label: Final Verification
steps: Test all 6 API routes via sentinelfortune.com (not Replit)
Test Stripe payment → webhook → channel delivery
Confirm CF Pages loads correctly on all 8 domains
